headline: Willis expands its international property facility with up to USD 60 million ‘Follow’ capacity per placement
summary: LONDON, June 08, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Willis, a WTW business (NASDAQ: WTW), today announced the expansion of its international property facility, now able to offer up to USD 60 million of follow capacity per placement. The facility’s expanded lead panel of Lloyd’s syndicates is able to quote competitively across a range of primary and excess layers. The automatic follow capacity, which is supported by Willis’ algorithmic digital platform Neuron, has also expanded with new markets. The territ
